data.body:
LIVE STAGED ROLLOUT COMPLETE — box i-00880b2c7f13527c5, continuous auto-deploy is LIVE. All ACs verified on the real box (evidence below):

INSTALL (timer disabled): install-autodeploy.sh bootstrapped the mirror clone (/var/lib/rebar/mirror, HTTPS), installed rebar-autodeploy.{service,timer}, timer DISABLED. Verified is-enabled=disabled/is-active=inactive.

MANUAL DRY-RUN (bootstrap deploy): ran autodeploy.sh from the mirror with the unit env; seeded deployed-sha to pre-S2 f85f47a57. Result: deployed-sha f85f47a57->463739cdb; review-bot image 0ee335c7->1480b860; bot NOW carries S2 merge-change code (assemble.py + review_bot/gerrit_client.py present in the container — S5 PREREQ SATISFIED, bot was pre-S2); gerrit container id UNCHANGED (ef56267f, blast radius held); .env byte-identical (sha 6d31347f, 600 owner preserved); config detect-only fired (AUTODEPLOY_ERROR config_manual — replication/g2p/refs-meta signalled, NOT applied); :prev rollback tag created; health {status:ok}. AC1/AC2/AC3 + box-adaptation ACs ✓.

ENABLE + AUTONOMOUS TIMER DEPLOY: systemctl enable --now; rewound deployed-sha to pre-S2; the TIMER (not manual) fired at 19:52:51 and autonomously rebuilt+restarted review-bot (redeployed+healthy; deploy complete: reflects 463739cdb), then the 19:54:59 fire logged 'up to date; no-op' (idempotent). Timer recurring every 2min. AC1 (≤5min, no manual action, idempotent) ✓.

SELF-HEAL (AC4): injected a forced health-check failure (/etc/rebar/autodeploy.env HEALTH_URL unreachable) + rewound deployed-sha; the real systemd service ran: build succeeded -> up -> health check FAILED -> 'ROLLING BACK to :prev' -> deployed-sha NOT advanced (stayed pre-S2) -> backoff recorded (fail#1, 60s) -> bot /health:8000 stayed UP ('last-known-good stays live') -> gerrit UNCHANGED. Cleaned up + restored to steady state (deployed-sha=main, bot=S2 healthy, timer re-enabled, clean no-op confirmed). AC4 ✓; AC5 backoff proven (fail#1=60s; SHA-keyed reset by construction; systemd StartLimit storm-guard in the unit).

BLAST RADIUS (AC3): gerrit container id ef56267f unchanged across ALL deploys (dry-run, autonomous, self-heal); no Gerrit restart; refs/meta/config never auto-applied (detect-only).

OBSERVABILITY (AC7): observability.sh §4d publishes rebar/host:deploy_errors from AUTODEPLOY_ERROR journal markers; monitoring_autodeploy.tf CloudWatch alarm 'rebar-autodeploy-errors' APPLIED live (terraform apply -target; threshold 0, 2x300s, wired to rebar-gerrit-alerts SNS). Seeded the deploy-errors offset so test markers don't false-spike.

CI CONFIG-GATE (AC6): make config-check wired in test.yml AND gerrit-verify.yaml on main (verified); passes on valid config.

BACK-OUT (AC7): systemctl disable --now rebar-autodeploy.timer (documented in unit + ADR 0026); manual path (compose-up.sh) unchanged.

Code landed via Gerrit change 231 (LLM-Review+1, Verified+1, MERGED, replicated to main=463739cdb). Plan re-gated PASS after box-adaptation.
